title: Passport Concierge Itinerary Form
description: A travel-planning template with passport-book styling and destination vibes.
successMessage: Your itinerary request is on its way.

fields.label: Passport or visa notes
fields.placeholder: Share passport country, visa concerns, or deadlines.

fields.label: Must-haves
fields.placeholder: Boutique hotels, food tour, kid-friendly stops…

customHtml:
EXPLORE

{{form:title}}

{{form:description}}

{{field:row_primary}}{{field:travel_style}}{{field:row_trip}}{{field:passport_help}}{{field:passport_details}}
{{field:must_haves}}{{field:budget_band}}{{field:notes}}
customCss: .mfp.mfp-passport-concierge{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1d4ed8 55%,#38bdf8);padding:28px}.mfp-passport-concierge .mfp-shell{max-width:1080px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:340px 1fr;gap:22px}.mfp-passport-concierge .passport-cover{background:rgba(15,23,42,.82);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:30px;padding:30px;box-shadow:0 20px 55px rgba(2,6,23,.3)}.mfp-passport-concierge .stamp{display:inline-flex;padding:6px 12px;border:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,.45);border-radius:999px;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.14em;margin-bottom:18px}.mfp-passport-concierge h1{margin:0 0 14px;font-size:38px;line-height:1.02}.mfp-passport-concierge p{margin:0;color:#cbd5e1;line-height:1.7}.mfp-passport-concierge .passport-pages{display:grid;gap:18px}.mfp-passport-concierge .passport-page{background:#fff;border-radius:26px;padding:24px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.7);position:relative}.mfp-passport-concierge .passport-page:before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:14px;border:1px dashed #bfdbfe;border-radius:18px;pointer-events:none}.mfp-passport-concierge .passport-page.alt{background:#eff6ff}.mfp-passport-concierge .mfp-actions button[type=submit]{width:100%;border:none;border-radius:16px;padding:15px 28px;background:#0f172a;color:#fff;font-weight:800}.mfp-passport-concierge .mf-field,.mfp-passport-concierge .mf-row{margin-bottom:14px}@media(max-width:860px){.mfp.mfp-passport-concierge{padding:16px}.mfp-passport-concierge .mfp-shell{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
